mapper.select:
SELECT r.sell_contract_id AS sellId, r.buy_contract_id AS buyId, c1.pay_full_time AS sellPayTime, r.product_name AS productName, r.brand_number AS brandNumber, r.factory_id AS factoryId, r.factory_name AS factoryName, r.deal_number AS sellNumber, r.sell_price AS sellPrice, r.sell_user_id AS sellMatchId, r.sell_user_name AS sellMatchName, r.buy_user_name AS buyMatchName, r.buy_company_name AS buyCompanyName, r.buy_company_id AS buyCompanyId, r.buy_price AS buyPrice, c2.pay_full_time AS buyPayTime, r.sell_company_id AS sellCompanyId, r.sell_company_name AS sellCompanyName, c1.dept_id AS deptId, r.deal_number AS buyNumber, IFNULL(c1.transport_amount, 0) AS sellTransportAmount, IFNULL(c2.transport_amount, 0) AS buyTransportAmount FROM t_ctr_contract c1 LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_rela r ON c1.id = r.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c2 ON c2.id = r.buy_contract_id WHERE c1.source = 'MS' AND c1.pay_full_time != '' AND c2.source = 'MB' AND c1.pay_full_time = c2.pay_full_time AND c1.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
ORDER BY r.id DESC
ORDER BY r.id ASC
ORDER BY r.id DESC
